title: piper buchtienii var. charopampanum
intro: Piper buchtienii var. charopampanum, also known as the Thai peppercorn or Thai long pepper, is a variety of the Piper buchtienii plant, a species of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in Thai medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Piper buchtienii var. charopampanum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and other medicinal products.
